title: FP8 GEMM Exact Search
goal: Search exact GEMM implementations for Ampere and newer GPUs without changing dequantization math or accumulation semantics.
exactness_gate: Output tensor must match the exact float32 fallback baseline.
No weight-layout semantic change is allowed.
allowed_changes: Use cached dequantized weights if memory budget permits
Use CUDA, CUTLASS, TileLang, Triton, or cuBLASLt
forbidden_changes: Lower precision accumulation in the default path
